# SocialRx

> Done-for-you social media management for physicians — build authority, attract patients, and grow your practice in 90 days.

SocialRx is a physician-focused social media management agency. We create HIPAA-compliant content, manage paid advertising across Meta, LinkedIn, and Google, produce authority-building webinars, and provide monthly analytics and growth reporting. Founded by Andrew Stafford, SocialRx operates under Your AI Group (YAIG).

## Key Facts

- Specializes exclusively in physician and healthcare provider social media
- All content goes through a HIPAA-aware review process
- 90-Day Growth Guarantee: measurable patient growth or we work free until you get it
- Manages Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, TikTok, YouTube, and X
- Limits clients per specialty per market to prevent internal competition
- Typical results: measurable engagement growth within 30 days, patient inquiries within 60-90 days
- Less than 30 minutes per month required from the physician
- No long-term contracts — month-to-month billing

## Services

- Social Media Management: Content creation, scheduling, and community management across 3-6+ platforms with HIPAA-compliant processes
- Paid Advertising: Campaign management on Meta (Facebook/Instagram), LinkedIn, and Google with ROI tracking
- Authority Webinars: Monthly or weekly physician-led webinar production to establish thought leadership
- Analytics & Growth Strategy: Monthly reporting with engagement metrics, follower growth, patient inquiry attribution
- Online Reputation Management: Review monitoring, response management, and reputation building

## Plans & Pricing

- Practice Launchpad ($1,497/mo): 3 platforms, 12 posts/month, branded templates, basic analytics
- Growth Accelerator ($2,997/mo): 5 platforms, 20 posts/month, paid ad management, monthly webinars, advanced analytics
- Authority Builder ($4,997/mo): All platforms, 30+ posts/month, full ad management, weekly webinars, dedicated strategist

## FAQ

- Does social media work for doctors? Yes — the majority of patients research doctors online before booking. Social media builds the authority and visibility that converts searchers into patients.
- How much time does this take from the physician? Less than 30 minutes per month. We send content for quick approval via text or email.
- What about HIPAA compliance? Every piece of content goes through our HIPAA-aware review process. We focus on educational content, expertise, and properly consented patient stories.
- How is SocialRx different from generic agencies? We specialize exclusively in physician social media — the strategies, compliance requirements, and content that builds real medical authority.

- [Book a Strategy Session](https://socialrx.biz/#book): $99 strategy session booking

## Research & Insights

- Physicians who post 4+ times per week see 3.2x higher engagement than those posting once per week
- 77% of patients research their doctor online before booking
- 63% of patients choose one provider over another based on their social media presence
- 60% of patients trust a doctor more after seeing educational social content
- Social media marketing delivers 3-10x ROI compared to traditional healthcare advertising
- 72% of healthcare organizations increased their social media budgets in 2025
